Description: Root CloudFormation stack for jessehattabaugh.com. Manages S3, IAM, CloudFront, API Gateway, Lambda, and Route 53 resources.

ProjectName.Description: A name for the project, used to prefix resource names for uniqueness and clarity.

DomainName.Description: The root domain name (e.g., example.com) for the website.

Subdomain.Description: The subdomain for the current environment (e.g., 'www', 'dev', or branch name). Use '@' for the root domain.

HostedZoneId.Description: The Route 53 Hosted Zone ID for the DomainName.

AcmCertificateArn.Description: ARN of the ACM SSL/TLS certificate for the domain/subdomain. Must be in us-east-1 for CloudFront.

BranchName.Description: The current Git branch name, used for tagging and conditional resource naming.

StaticAssetsS3BucketName.Description: Name for the S3 bucket that will store static assets. Will be prefixed with project name and suffixed with region.

LambdaFunctionName.Description: Base name for the application Lambda function.

LambdaCodeS3Key.Description: S3 key for the Lambda function's deployment package (.zip). Example: lambda/app.zip

ApiGatewayStageName.Description: Name for the API Gateway stage.

StaticAssetsBucketNameOutput.Description: Name of the S3 bucket for static assets

CodeBuildServiceRoleArnOutput.Description: ARN of the CodeBuild service role

LambdaFunctionArnOutput.Description: ARN of the application Lambda function

LambdaFunctionNameOutput.Description: Name of the application Lambda function

ApiIdOutput.Description: ID of the HTTP API Gateway

ApiEndpointOutput.Description: Endpoint URL for the HTTP API Gateway Stage
